dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: It's time to wake up.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Your streets, shall once again run red with your blood.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Menendez is a terrorist.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: We're bringing peace and security to the world.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 6
dialogue_segments.text: He refuses to let me go.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 7
dialogue_segments.text: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 6
dialogue_segments.text: A lot of people counting on us for answers.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 14
dialogue_segments.text: You shall know fear.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 8
dialogue_segments.text: Specter one, report.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 8
dialogue_segments.text: Need a sitrep.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 9
dialogue_segments.text: This isn't real.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 10
dialogue_segments.text: The hell it ain't!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Obey your master.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Control faster.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Master of puppets are pulling the strings!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Twisting your mind, smashing your dreams!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Blinded by me, you can’t see a thing

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Just call my name ’cause I’ll hear you scream

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Master, master, where’s the dreams that I’ve been after?

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Master, master, you promised only lies!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 12
dialogue_segments.text: Pull it together, man!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: So eager to leave daddy.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 13
dialogue_segments.text: Killing the man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 15
dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a Mason.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 6
dialogue_segments.text: No more games! This ends now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Obey your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 16
dialogue_segments.text: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you preorder now!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 11
dialogue_segments.text: Master, master

- spk_007 => Speaker 7 | grounded confidence: 0.90 | acoustic cues: authoritative, gravelly, older military-leader cadence | inferred traits: gender: male (human-reviewed older general/leader read) | recent lines: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.
- spk_008 => Speaker 8 | grounded confidence: 0.88 | acoustic cues: distressed younger comms/radio voice | inferred traits: gender: male (likely same comms speaker across both lines; racial presentation remains uncertain) | recent lines: Specter one, report. / Need a sitrep.
- spk_009 => Speaker 9 | grounded confidence: 0.86 | acoustic cues: deeper squadmate voice, grounded in-scene delivery | inferred traits: gender: male (human review read this as a deeper African-American male squadmate voice) | recent lines: This isn't real.

- spk_012 => Speaker 12 | grounded confidence: 0.88 | acoustic cues: urgent adult squadmate command | inferred traits: gender: female (human review read an African-American female squadmate with tattoos) | recent lines: Pull it together, man!

Voice separation reminders:
- speaker_id continuity is acoustic, not semantic.
- Do not collapse scene dialogue, comms, sung lyrics, promo VO, and overlapping hallucination blends into one speaker unless the voice clearly matches.
- If identity is uncertain, preserve the uncertainty in notes/descriptors instead of promoting a guess to fact.
- The mixed "You were never cut out to be a Mason" line is intentionally represented as an overlap-heavy speaker bucket rather than a falsely precise identity claim.
